title: Dave Grusch: Are Aliens Time Travelers From The Future?
summary: Dave Grusch discusses the hypothesis that UAP-related beings could be time travelers from the future, exploring how human evolutionary biology and the concept of neoteny might support this theory based on reported encounter descriptions.

key_claims.claim: There is a concept in evolutionary biology called neoteny where distant offspring resemble current children
Beings described in close encounters are often characterized as childlike in nature
Human bodies are becoming somewhat vestigial as we have abundant resources
The reported beings are supposedly somewhat telepathic
The physical characteristics of reported beings align with potential human evolutionary trajectory
